steps.t: In hopes of flushing out the thief, Múta has asked you to retrieve the remaining supplies at Durshulot. Durshulot sits on the middle tier, east of Gab…
You have retrieved the stolen supplies. You should return to Múta at Gabil-memâg, west of Durshulot.
Múta has captured the Orc thief. You should talk to him.
The Orc seems to be done rambling. You should talk to Múta and figure out what to do with him.
Múta will return to Aslíf on the upper tier with the Orc as a prisoner. Náin will be interested to hear what you have to say about what happened.
